mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, p.name AS name, p.role AS role, p.bio AS bio, p.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, COUNT(pr.id) AS projectCount, p.email AS email, p.github_url AS githubUrl, p.website_url AS websiteUrl, p.discord_tag AS discordTag FROM users u LEFT JOIN profiles p ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN projects pr ON pr.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.nickname, p.name, p.role, p.bio, p.avatar_url, p.email, p.github_url, p.website_url, p.discord_tag ORDER BY u.created_at ASC
SELECT id AS id, title AS title, description AS description, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, tech_stack AS techStack, status AS status FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC
